segments.text: This moment is eating away at Acola's stocks!
segments.original_text: この一瞬がアコラの寿命を蝕んでいく
トロッコを無視を確認しているか
上必殺技は回避を見ていて

segments.text: Platform land, nair, airdodge land, got through!
segments.original_text: 台上着地N回避着地通った

segments.text: Oh, shielding to read the situation
segments.original_text: あ、展開シールド様子見ですが

full_text: This moment is eating away at Acola's stocks! The minecart! Confirmed the hazard avoid! Up B reading the airdodge Platform land, nair, airdodge land, got through! Oh, shielding to read the situation No! That...
